source.title: Genki 3rd Edition Vocabulary Index
source.selectionRule: Kanji-form entries referenced by Conversation/Grammar lessons L1-L23, including lesson-end column references.

availableModes.label: Kanji Spelling
availableModes.description: Recall a vocabulary word’s kanji spelling from its meaning.

availableModes.label: Word → Japanese
availableModes.description: See an English meaning and recall the Japanese word in kana or kanji.

availableModes.label: Kanji → Reading
availableModes.description: See the written word and type its reading in kana or romaji.

availableModes.label: Kanji → Meaning
availableModes.description: See the written word and type an accepted English meaning.
